preSessionState.CLAUDE.md:
# Project Guidelines

## Architecture
- This project follows the repository pattern for data access
- Services depend on repositories, never on each other directly
- Events are preferred over direct cross-service calls for decoupling
- All business logic lives in the service layer

## Coding Conventions
- Use TypeScript strict mode — no `any` types
- All public methods must have JSDoc comments
- Use dependency injection via constructor parameters
- Error handling: throw typed errors, never return null for errors
- Prefer async/await over raw Promises

## Testing
- Tests use vitest
- Each module has a corresponding test file in tests/
- Mock external dependencies, test business logic directly
- Minimum: test the happy path and one error path per public method

## File Organization
- src/models/ — Data models and interfaces
- src/repositories/ — Data access layer (implements repository interfaces)
- src/services/ — Business logic layer
- src/events/ — Event definitions and event bus
- src/utils/ — Shared utilities (database, logger, pagination)
- src/config/ — Configuration files
- tests/ — Test files mirroring src/ structure

## Git Practices
- Commit atomically per logical change
- Write descriptive commit messages explaining the "why"
- Run tests before committing

{"entry_type":"status","summary":"Agent-1: Notification system foundation complete — event-driven via EventBus, adapter pattern for channels","detail":"Implemented notification system foundation (commit cd81fbf):

ARCHITECTURE: Pure event-driven via EventBus (no CallbackRegistry).

NEW FILES:
- src/models/notification.ts — Core types: Notification, NotificationPayload, NotificationResult, NotificationType, NotificationChannel, NotificationPriority
- src/adapters/notification.adapter.ts — NotificationAdapter interface (all channels must implement)
- src/adapters/email.adapter.ts — EmailAdapter stub implementing NotificationAdapter

MODIFIED FILES:
- src/services/notification.service.ts — Rewritten: subscribes to EventBus events, dispatches to registered adapters, emits notification:sent events
- src/services/order.service.ts — Status changes now use EventBus.emit() instead of CallbackRegistry
- src/events/event-types.ts — Added NotificationSentEvent to AppEvent union
- src/index.ts — Exports all new types and adapters

CONSTRAINTS FOR OTHER DEVELOPERS:
1. All notifications must flow through EventBus.emit() — no direct service calls
2. All delivery channels must implement NotificationAdapter interface
3. Register adapters via NotificationService.registerAdapter()
4. NotificationService is the sole consumer of domain events for notification purposes
5. New channels: add to NotificationChannel type, create adapter, register with service

All 70 tests pass. TypeScript compiles cleanly.","tags":["architecture","notification","event-driven"],"scope":"src/services/,src/adapters/,src/models/,src/events/","agent_id":"agent-1","id":"01KN71MV35EWKVMXDA5RHGGR78","timestamp":"2026-04-02T12:10:47.781Z"}
